overall.description: A ship simulator game showing the view from the bridge of a cargo vessel navigating through open water during dusk. The camera faces forward over the ship's bow while the vessel moves steadily through calm seas under overcast skies, with navigation monitors visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with forward view over bow deck

agents.ego_description: operating the cargo ship from the bridge, maintaining course through open water while monitoring navigation systems

entered.detail: metal deck of the cargo ship with red safety markings and forward railings visible through the bridge window
white metal safety railings lining the edge of the bow deck
dark blue-grey open sea with gentle waves extending to the horizon
distant boundary between overcast sky and calm sea

segments.scene_description: The view from a ship's bridge shows the vessel cruising steadily through open water during dusk. The bow deck with its safety railings occupies the foreground, while the calm ocean stretches to the horizon under an overcast sky. The scene remains consistent as the ship maintains its forward course through the sheltered waters.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, forward-facing perspective from a ship's bridge as it cruises through a tranquil maritime environment at dusk. It begins with a view over the bow deck, where safety railings frame the foreground against a vast expanse of open water. As the vessel maintains its constant course, the camera captures the seamless movement across the calm ocean surface. The scene remains consistent and undisturbed, gliding steadily toward the horizon under a heavy, overcast sky.
